scheme_name: Karnataka Rajiv Gandhi Scholarship for SC/ST Students
details: The Karnataka Rajiv Gandhi Scholarship provides financial assistance to SC and ST students pursuing higher education in recognized colleges and universities within Karnataka. It covers tuition fees, hostel charges, and a monthly stipend to ensure students from disadvantaged backgrounds can complete their education without financial hardship.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement + ₹1,500/month stipend for hostellers; ₹750/month for day scholars.
tags: scholarship student education Karnataka SC ST

details: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN) is a central government scheme that provides income support of ₹6,000 per year to all eligible farmer families across India, delivered in three equal instalments of ₹2,000 directly into their bank accounts.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three instalments of ₹2,000 each via Direct Benefit Transfer.
tags: farmer agriculture kisan income support central

details: The Maharashtra Atal Udyog Yojana supports first-generation entrepreneurs by providing interest subsidy on term loans taken for setting up micro and small enterprises. The scheme is specifically targeted at youth entrepreneurs and startup founders in Maharashtra.
benefits: 5% interest subsidy on term loans up to ₹25 lakh for a period of 5 years.
tags: entrepreneur startup MSME loan subsidy Maharashtra

details: PM-SYM is a central government voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganised sector workers with a monthly income up to ₹15,000. Enrolled members receive a minimum assured pension of ₹3,000 per month after the age of 60.
benefits: Minimum assured pension of ₹3,000/month after age 60. Government matches the subscriber's monthly contribution.
tags: worker daily wage pension unorganised shramik central

details: The Kerala Karunya Health Scheme provides financial assistance to BPL (Below Poverty Line) families in Kerala for major surgeries and critical illness treatments at empanelled government and private hospitals. The scheme covers costs that are otherwise unaffordable for economically weaker sections.
benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹2,00,000 per family per year for critical illnesses and major surgeries.
tags: health insurance surgery BPL Kerala medical

scheme_name: Rajasthan Mukhyamantri Laghu Udyog Protsahan Yojana
details: This scheme by the Government of Rajasthan promotes self-employment by offering interest subsidy on loans for establishing or expanding micro and small enterprises. Targeted especially at youth from all categories to reduce unemployment.
benefits: Interest subsidy ranging from 5% to 8% on loans from ₹10 lakh to ₹10 crore for micro and small enterprises.
tags: entrepreneur startup MSME Rajasthan subsidy loan

scheme_name: National Scholarship Portal - Post-Matric Scholarship (SC Students)
details: The Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students is a central government scheme administered through the National Scholarship Portal. It provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste students pursuing post-matriculation or post-secondary education in India.
benefits: Full maintenance allowance + course fee reimbursement. Amount varies by course level (₹1,200 to ₹3,000/month).
tags: scholarship SC student post-matric central NSP

details: The Punjab Ghar Ghar Rozgar scheme is a state employment initiative connecting unemployed youth with job opportunities and skill development programmes. It focuses on vocational training, apprenticeships, and job fairs to reduce unemployment in Punjab.
benefits: Free skill development training, job placement assistance, and a ₹2,500/month stipend during apprenticeship.
tags: employment skill training Punjab youth rozgar jobs
